mapper.select: select id, type, name, pid, code ,route from tb_permissions where id in (select per_id from tb_rel_role_permission where role_id = #{roleId}) and type = 'MENU' and enable = 1 order by order_index asc
select id, code from tb_permissions where enable = 1 and id in (select per_id from tb_rel_role_permission where role_id = #{roleId}) order by order_index asc
